title: Browser Displays a Red Error Page
breadcrumbs: Browser Displays a Red Error Page
text: Browser Displays a Red Error Page Depending on the specific error, the browser may display HTTP 4xx or 5xx status codes in the debug console. The following table outlines common causes and recommended resolutions for these errors. Error: 400 URD_BAD_REQUEST Bad request detected by WRD in HTTP server Bad HTTP request, data size is larger than the maximum allowed size. Please contact your system administrator. Possible cause Resolution The content data size of the request is larger than the value of parameter MAXPOSTDATASIZE . If the large data size of a request is necessary based on your application logic, adjust the value of the servlet parameter MAXPOSTDATASIZE . Otherwise, talk with your network administrator. Error : 300 URD_MW_ERROR Middleware: UV8 Error: -24 Possible cause Resolution userver.exe cannot be started. Error -24, NETERR_START_SERVER , is returned if URouter could not create a UServer process, for example, because the executable was not found. Specify correct location for Uniface Server in the urouter.asn file. Stop the Uniface Router service. Restart the Uniface Router service. Error: 300 URD_MW_ERROR Middleware: UV8 Error#: -25 Possible cause Resolution Server assignment file cannot be found. Check the UST entry for UServer in the [SERVERS] section of urouter.asn For example: myust = d:/u8/bin/userver.exe /asn = userver.asn /dir = d:/u8/Project/web Also check whether the specified UST assignment file exists in the /adm directory, or in the directory specified in the /dir switch. Stop URouter via Services. Start URouter via Services. Error: 300 URD_MW_ERROR Middleware: UV8 Error#: Failure in the connection to the Uniface Application Server Error Text: Cannot connect to the Uniface process on the remote address/port. Error ID: Number Possible cause Resolution URouter is not running. Start URouter via Services. Check the web server log files for the precise error. Error: 213 URD_ACCESS_DENIED Access denied. Possible cause Resolution preRequest trigger or preActivate trigger returns $status=-21 when, for example, the wrong password is provided. The WRD should redisplay logon form when $status=-21 is returned by UServer. Specify correct username and password. Error: 212 URD_PROVIDE_AUTH User-name and password were not provided. Possible causes Resolution On Logon screen, Cancel button is pressed with empty username and password. OR BASIC authentication scheme is not supported or is disabled by the Web browser. Specify username. Error: 103 URD_NO_NEW_APP Server: A new application could not be established. Possible cause Resolution The middleware module UV8 is not specified in the MIDDLEWARE servlet setting. Specify MIDDLEWARE=UV8: Host | ... Stop and restart the web server (for example, Tomcat). Try the Server Page again. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
